name: Souper Rice and Turkey
recipeIngredient: 2 10.75 oz cans cream of mushroom soup
2 cups frozen peas and carrots, or
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the soup and water into the Crock-Pot.
2. Mix well.
3. Add the remaining ingredients and stir.
4. Cook for 6 to 8 hours on Low, or 3 to 4 hours on High.
5. If desired, add soy sauce.
